title: hieracium subtomentosum
intro: Hieracium subtomentosum, also known as the woolly hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium subtomentosum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and overall well-being. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
